headline: Cloudflare, ServiceNow, And Guardant Health Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Losers Last Week (April 6-April 10): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Macro concerns, AI competition, and analyst downgrades drove broad weekly losses across software and cloud stocks, led by Akamai, Okta, and Cloudflare.
